summary.diagnosis:
*Jul 10→Jul 16 vs Jul 3→Jul 9* · Revenue -6% (1,054,015 vs 1,119,573 EGP) · Spend -3% · ROAS 5.69 (-3%).
   • CPC: 2.22 → 2.23 EGP (+0%, ~flat)
   • CVR: 1.12% → 1.03% (-8%, down (drag))
   • AOV: 1,160 → 1,234 EGP (+6%, up (good))
   *Who moved it:* *CVR 56%* of the move (hurt, -92,296 EGP)  ·  *AOV 41%* of the move (helped, +63,196 EGP)  ·  *CPC 3%* of the move (hurt, -831 EGP).
   *Read:* *CVR* fell -8%, the biggest of the three.
     Worth about *-92,296 EGP of revenue at the same clicks*.
     That drove ROAS -3%.
     Revenue -6% because spend -3%.
   *Deeper:* biggest single mover was *lblb beach bag essentials*, its CVR went 3.62%→2.06% on 9,670 EGP spend (~63% of the swing).

summary.diagnosis:
*Jul 10→Jul 16 vs Jul 3→Jul 9* · Revenue +139% (209,554 vs 87,699 EGP) · Spend +125% · ROAS 4.31 (+6%).
   • CPC: 9.4 → 9.66 EGP (+3%, ~flat)
   • CVR: 1.74% → 2.59% (+49%, up (good))
   • AOV: 2,192 → 1,612 EGP (-26%, down (drag))
   *Who moved it:* *CVR 54%* of the move (helped, +68,894 EGP)  ·  *AOV 42%* of the move (hurt, -75,400 EGP)  ·  *CPC 4%* of the move (hurt, -1,307 EGP).
   *Read:* *CVR* rose +49%, the biggest of the three.
     Worth about *68,894 EGP of revenue at the same clicks*.
     That drove ROAS +6%.
     Revenue +139% because spend +125%.
   *Deeper:* biggest single mover was <https://business.facebook.com/adsmanager/manage/ads?act=336343742536460&selected_ad_ids=120255290390060011|Swimwear jamican songs russian>, its CVR went 14.29%→1.66% on 2,089 EGP spend (~77% of the swing).
